name: Tengra Git
description: Read-only Git status, diff, log, and branch inspection tools packaged as an external MCP plugin.
author: Tengra Studio

tools.name: status
tools.description: Read concise Git status for a repository.

tools.name: diff
tools.description: Read Git diff for a repository or pathspec.

tools.name: log
tools.description: Read recent Git commit log entries.

tools.name: branches
tools.description: List local and remote Git branches.
